mapper.select: select address_id, user_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, province, city, district, detail_address, postal_code, is_default, status, create_time, update_time from market_address where address_id = #{addressId, jdbcType=BINARY}

select address_id, user_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, province, city, district, detail_address, postal_code, is_default, status, create_time, update_time from market_address where user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BINARY} and status = 'ACTIVE' order by is_default desc, create_time desc, address_id desc
mapper.update: update market_address set receiver_name = #{receiverName}, receiver_phone = #{receiverPhone}, province = #{province}, city = #{city}, district = #{district}, detail_address = #{detailAddress}, postal_code = #{postalCode}, is_default = #{default}, status = #{status}, update_time = current_timestamp where address_id = #{addressId, jdbcType=BINARY} and user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BINARY}
update market_address set is_default = false, update_time = current_timestamp where user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BINARY} and status = 'ACTIVE' and is_default = true

update market_address set status = 'DELETED', is_default = false, update_time = current_timestamp where address_id = #{addressId, jdbcType=BINARY} and user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BINARY} and status = 'ACTIVE'
